nodes.grounding_span: it's not always 100% accurate and tends to guess or make stuff up

nodes.label: Privacy-preserving AI use

nodes.label: Openness to AI collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I'm always open to collaborating with AI

nodes.label: Client well-being and treatment success
nodes.grounding_span: when that plan is successful and helps the client heal

nodes.label: Professional competence and growth
nodes.grounding_span: I never want to be 'the smartest person in the room' and am always looking for ways to grow

nodes.label: Client privacy and confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like the possibility of sharing someone's personal information

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: AI makes a great suggestion of something I hadn't considered which has been helpful

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it's not always 100% accurate and tends to guess or make stuff up

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for note-taking due to privacy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use AI for transcribing notes from sessions... I just haven't felt comfortable with it yet

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use if safeguards improve
nodes.grounding_span: if I feel like there are enough safe guards in place for privacy issues I may branch out

nodes.label: Independent verification — cross-checks AI suggestions with own research
nodes.grounding_span: I'll usually do my own research searching how other PTs may have used this exercise

nodes.label: Selective disclosure — cautious about sharing AI use with peers
nodes.grounding_span: I don't readily share my use of AI with others
